content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处将于4月28日21:55(UTC+8) 进行校内设施修复，更新完成后您将得到通知，重新进入游戏。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
  
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯×50
  
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2026年5月12日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
 
【问题修复】
【活动】
● 修复了英语、意大利语、德语、法语、西班牙语、葡萄牙语、土耳其语言设置下，「轮转之相」、「亘古罗网」、「因果苗圃·其二」唤醒活动的规则说明中「根源沉淀」数量错误的问题。
 
【战斗】
● 关卡
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，敌人的类型标签「异变体」措辞不统一的问题。
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，「星辰篇」第五章的部分敌人技能描述中错误地显示了代码的问题。
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，「星辰篇」第五章的个别敌人故事文本重复的问题。
● 相位对弈
    ○ 修复了英语语言设置下，钥令「腐烂盛筵」的效果描述过时的问题。
    ○ 修复了日语、韩语、葡萄牙语语言设置下，「排行奖励」的「排行规则」中积分排行和奖励的部分说明过时的问题。
 
【界面与功能】
● 修复了繁体中文语言设置下，部分名字文本错误的问题。
● 修复了韩语语言设置下，道具「灵啡肽」的措辞不统一的问题。

V2.5.0.4 Online Maintenance Announcement

Dear Keeper,
The Mythag Administration Office will conduct campus facility maintenance on April 28 at 21:55(UTC+8) . You will be notified once the update is complete and you can re-enter the game. As an apology for any inconvenience caused by the update, we will provide a supply package. Wishing everyone a successful investigation!
   
[Compensation]
Online Maintenance Compensation: Silver×50
   
[Claim Conditions]
The claiming time ends on May 12, 2026 at 23:59. Please remember to go to your mailox in time to claim the supply materials.
   
[Update content]
[Event]
● Fixed an issue in the English, Italian, German, French, Spanish, Portuguese, and Turkish language settings where the quantity of "Radix Sediment" was incorrect in the rule descriptions of the "Wheels of Rotation," "Sempiternal Web," and "Sylvan Omen·II" Awakening Events.
 
[Combat]
● Stage
    ○ Fixed an issue where the enemy type tag "Mutant" had inconsistent wording under English language settings.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, under English language settings, some enemy skill descriptions in Chapter 5 of "Astral Reign" incorrectly displayed code.
    ○ Fixed an issue where certain enemy story texts in Chapter 5 of "Astral Reign" were duplicated under the English language setting.
● Traphase
    ○ Fixed an issue where the Effect description for the Posse "Feast of Decay" was outdated under English language settings.
    ○ Fixed an issue where, under Japanese, Korean, and Portuguese language settings, some descriptions of point rankings and rewards in the "Ranking Rules" of "Ranking Rewards" were outdated.
 
[Interface & Features]
● Fixed an issue where some name texts were incorrect under the Traditional Chinese language setting.
● Fixed an issue where the wording for the item "Menophin" was inconsistent under Korean language settings.
